auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Lumos API token sent as a Bearer token. Create and manage API keys in Lumos API settings: https://developers.lumos.com/docs/rest-api.

actions.name: get_access_request
actions.description: Get a single Lumos access request by ID.

id.description: The ID of the access request to retrieve.

expand.description: Access request fields to expand. Lumos currently supports tasks and custom_fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Lumos access request.

id.description: The ID of the access request.

app_id.description: The ID of the app the request is for.

app_name.description: The name of the app the request is for.

status.description: The current status of the request.

anyOf.description: When the access request expires, if it has an expiration.
The lifetime of time-based access after provisioning, in seconds.
When the access request was created.

accessRequest.description: An access request returned by Lumos.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lumos access request response.

actions.name: get_appstore_app
actions.description: Get a single AppStore app from Lumos by app ID.

app_id.description: The ID of the AppStore app to retrieve.

expand.description: App fields to expand. Lumos currently supports custom_attributes.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Lumos AppStore app.

app.description: An AppStore app returned by Lumos.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lumos AppStore app response.

actions.name: list_access_requests
actions.description: List access requests in Lumos with optional user and status filters.

target_user_id.description: Filter requests by the ID of the target user.

requester_user_id.description: Filter requests by the ID of the requesting user.

user_id.description: Filter requests by the ID of the user.

statuses.description: Filter requests by their Lumos status values.

sort.description: Sort access requests by created date.

expand.description: Access request fields to expand. Lumos currently supports tasks and custom_fields.

page.description: The 1-based page number to request from Lumos.

size.description: The number of items per page. Lumos caps this value at 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Lumos access requests.

id.description: The ID of the access request.

app_id.description: The ID of the app the request is for.

app_name.description: The name of the app the request is for.

status.description: The current status of the request.

anyOf.description: When the access request expires, if it has an expiration.
The lifetime of time-based access after provisioning, in seconds.
When the access request was created.

items.description: An access request returned by Lumos.

accessRequests.description: The access requests returned by Lumos.

page.description: The page number returned by Lumos.

size.description: The page size returned by Lumos.

anyOf.description: The total number of items when Lumos returns it.

outputSchema.description: A normalized page of Lumos access requests.

actions.name: list_appstore_apps
actions.description: List AppStore apps in Lumos with optional search and visibility filters.

app_id.description: Filter apps by the ID of the app.

name_search.description: Search against name, app instance identifier, and app class ID.

exact_match.description: Whether the name_search filter should be an exact match.

all_visibilities.description: Whether to include apps regardless of AppStore visibility. Only available to admins.

expand.description: App fields to expand. Lumos currently supports custom_attributes.

page.description: The 1-based page number to request from Lumos.

size.description: The number of items per page. Lumos caps this value at 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Lumos AppStore apps.

items.description: An AppStore app returned by Lumos.

apps.description: The AppStore apps returned by Lumos.

page.description: The page number returned by Lumos.

size.description: The page size returned by Lumos.

anyOf.description: The total number of items when Lumos returns it.

outputSchema.description: A normalized page of Lumos AppStore apps.
